children.name: Product defects

AssertionError: Expected Oleksandr, but got 'Hlib'
assert 'Hlib' == 'Oleksandr'
  
  - Oleksandr
  + Hlib
Verify successful login, response time, and token validity

AssertionError: Expected to be on other user profile page, but was at: https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/ubs?tab=All%20habits
assert '/friends' in 'https://www.greencity.cx.ua/#/ubs?tab=All%20habits'
Check that a user is redirected to another Friend page after clicking on a friend card on the 'All friends' tab on the Friend page
AssertionError: Expected email error 'Введіть пошту.', but got 'Email is required.'
Verify validation errors when signing in with empty fields

AssertionError: assert False
 +  where False = <bound method PlacesSavedPage.is_more_options_filter_visible of <pages.abstract_pages.saved_abstract.places_saved_page.PlacesSavedPage object at 0x7f1db57ce030>>()

Verify filters and search controls are displayed on Saved Places page
